productName: SMC - Infused Joint Pack - Indica - Blue OG - 5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Blue OG flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of berry, blueberry, and earthy, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
